scripts.css: lightningcss --minify --targets '>0.25%, last 2 versions, not dead' -o public/styles.css src/styles.css && bun scripts/inline-css.mjs
scripts.css:watch: lightningcss --minify --targets '>0.25%, last 2 versions, not dead' -o public/styles.css src/styles.css && bun scripts/inline-css.mjs
scripts.deploy: bun css && wrangler d1 migrations apply konzert-haus-db --remote && wrangler deploy
